subject: Add JsonUtil and use it
commit_message:
Add JsonUtil and use it

Get rid of org.openecomp.core.utilities.json.JsonUtil

Change-Id: I1dff97931dd76dde80c383baca9ff9e28e23d8ad
Issue-ID: SDC-1606
Signed-off-by: talig <talig@amdocs.com>
